mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_entry WHERE status = 1 AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 1 WHEN tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 2 WHEN summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, view_count DESC, updated_at DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) FROM knowledge_entry WHERE status = 1
